items.title: Best Stock to Buy Right Now: Costco vs. Home Depot
items.author: Neil Patel
items.description: Costco and Home Depot are two leading retail companies with strong market positions and long-term potential. While Costco has reported solid financial results, its current valuation is high, making Home Depot the better buy at the moment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Costco is a dominant player in the warehouse club industry, with a strong membership base and high customer retention. The company has been reporting solid financial results and is expected to have long-term staying power.

Home Depot is the clear leader in the home improvement industry, which has long-term growth potential due to an aging housing stock and a shortage of housing inventory. While the company has faced some challenges recently, its current valuation makes it the better buy compared to Costco.

items.title: Have $500? 2 Absurdly Cheap Stocks Long-Term Investors Should Buy Right Now
items.author: Lawrence Rothman, Cfa
items.description: The article discusses two undervalued stocks, Ulta Beauty and Home Depot, that have underperformed the S&P 500 but present buying opportunities for long-term investors. Ulta Beauty's stock is trading at a lower P/E ratio compared to its historical average and the S&P 500, while Home Depot's stock is also trading at a discount to the broader market despite the recent slowdown in home improvement projects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that Ulta Beauty's stock is undervalued, trading at a P/E ratio of 17 compared to its historical median of 27 and the S&P 500's P/E of 30. The company's broad product offerings and ability to weather inflationary pressures make it an attractive investment opportunity for long-term investors.

The article indicates that Home Depot's stock is trading at a discount to the S&P 500, with a P/E ratio of 26 compared to the broader market's 30. The company is well-positioned to benefit from the eventual recovery in the housing market and home improvement projects, making it a compelling investment for long-term investors.
